falsification_conditions.condition: Price closes above the 200-day moving average by 5% or more
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A clear bullish breakout would invalidate the 'HOLD' signal, indicating a strong reversal from the historical bottom pattern.

falsification_conditions.condition: Trading volume surges to 50% above the 30-day average on two consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained extreme volume would signal a blowoff top, contradicting the current 'HOLD' and suggesting a rapid reversal in trend.

falsification_conditions.condition: Blowoff score increases to 50 or higher within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant rise in the blowoff score would confirm a blowoff top scenario, directly refuting the current 'HOLD' verdict.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
